scripts.dev:prepare: pnpm --filter @urms/shared build && pnpm --filter @urms/domain build && pnpm --filter @urms/db build
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @urms/shared build && pnpm --filter @urms/domain build && pnpm --filter @urms/logger build && pnpm --filter @urms/plugin-ollama build && pnpm --filter @urms/plugin-resource-types build && pnpm --filter @urms/db build && pnpm --filter @urms/api build && pnpm --filter @urms/web build && pnpm --filter @urms/desktop build:web
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @urms/domain test && pnpm --filter @urms/plugin-ollama test && pnpm --filter @urms/plugin-resource-types test && pnpm --filter @urms/db test && pnpm --filter @urms/api test && pnpm --filter @urms/web test && pnpm --filter @urms/desktop test
scripts.test:vision: pnpm --filter @urms/domain test && pnpm --filter @urms/api test -- src/routes/routes.test.ts && pnpm --filter @urms/desktop test && playwright test --config playwright.vision.config.ts
